restaurants.name: Mala Garden Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: aims to recreate the Balinese ambiance of harmony between nature and living space. The restaurant, located on the lake, is designed to blur the lines between indoors and outdoors, creating a seamless experience
must_try_dishes: Nasi Campur (rice with a selection of small dishes)
Gado-Gado (a vegetable salad with peanut sauce)
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

restaurants.name: Mistral
restaurants.ambience: sophisticated and stylish ambience. It features a contemporary design with a focus on natural light and materials, creating a relaxed and elegant atmosphere. The restaurant also offers stunning views, contributing to a memorable dining experience
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

restaurants.name: Cocana Sunset Club Gili Trawangan
restaurants.ambience: sophisticated, laid-back ambiance with a focus on beach club vibes and breathtaking sunset views. It's described as a haven of chill vibes, laid-back luxury, and a shimmering, seductive charm
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

restaurants.name: Hula! Sunset Beach Club & Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: vibrant, tropical, and relaxed ambiance. It offers a stylish yet casual atmosphere with multiple seating options, including beanbags, cabanas, and beachfront tables. The restaurant is also known for its floating dining experience, perfect for special occasions
must_try_dishes: Pan-Fried Mahi Fish with Creamy Garlic Sauce
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

restaurants.name: Rabbit Jump
restaurants.ambience: relaxed and vibrant beach club atmosphere, perfect for enjoying the sunset and relaxing in the pool. It's known for its casual, trendy vibe, making it a great spot for both relaxing and socializing
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

restaurants.name: Better Me Cafe Gili Trawangan
restaurants.ambience: casual, cozy, and trendy ambiance. It's described as a relaxed and inviting space with a warm atmosphere, making it ideal for relaxation or socializing. The cafe features bright and cozy decor with natural light
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

restaurants.name: Le Petit Gili
restaurants.ambience: vibrant and lively atmosphere, offering a mix of international and Indonesian cuisine. It's a popular spot for both accommodation and dining, featuring a bar and restaurant area that's particularly lively at night
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

restaurants.name: Lolita Gili
restaurants.ambience: vibrant and lively ambiance, described as casual, cozy, and trendy. It features colorful wall paintings, neon lights, and a pool, creating a visually appealing and energetic atmosphere
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

restaurants.name: Kanyu Cafe and Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: cozy and refined ambiance with elegant interior design and warm lighting. It's described as an inviting atmosphere suitable for both quick bites and leisurely gatherings. Kanchi Cafe, with its branches in various locations, emphasizes a temple-style ambience and authentic South Indian flavors
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

attractions.name: Gili Trawangan Night Market
attractions.description: Night market for local food and shopping
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

hotels.name: Aston Sunset Beach Resort
hotels._source_file: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

transport_options.description: Horse-drawn cart transport on the car-free island
transport_options._source_file: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf

transport_options.description: Rental bicycles for exploring the car-free island
transport_options._source_file: Bali Indonesia/Bali Bliss All-Inclusive Guide - Priyankee and Varun.pdf
